This needs validation by running aa-status and checking dmesg/audit logs after loading.
  2) Profile consolidation: There are two consecutive cat > /etc/apparmor.d/ubuntu_agent_sandcat_https-1 blocks. The second block will overwrite the first when reloaded. Ideally maintain a single, definitive profile content and version/manage changes with a proper diff/Audit process.

The attack flow shows staging these files for exfiltration and then tar/zip/curl to a remote host.
